title: Umar ibn Al-Khattāb
description: The life of Umar ibn Al-Khattab (R.A), the second Caliph of Islam — from his early days as an enemy of Islam to his conversion, his leadership under Prophet Muhammad (PBUH), and his historic caliphate that transformed the Muslim world.

episodes.label: Family Affairs, Torture and Boycott of Muslims
Persecution of Muslims by the Meccans
Bilal ibn Rabah Gains Freedom and Embraces Islam
Hijrah to Yathrib, Medina, Building Al-Masjid an-Nabawi
Battle of Badr, Death of Abu Jahl
Quraish Plan for the Second Battle Against Muslims
Battle of Uhud, Digging the Trench
Battle of Khandaq, Treaty of Hudaibiyah
The Year of Delegations, First Hajj
Khalid ibn al-Walid Embraces Islam, Conquest of Mecca
Abu Sufyan Embraces Islam, Death of Muhammad PBUH
Abu Bakr Becomes the First Caliph
Death of Abu Bakr, Umar Becomes Caliph, Battle of Yarmouk
Battle of Yarmouk Against Theodore Trithyrius

title: Prophet Yousuf (A.S)
description: The life story of Prophet Yousuf (Joseph), peace be upon him — from his childhood in Canaan, his trials of betrayal and imprisonment in Egypt, to his rise as a trusted governor and the miraculous reunion with his family. Based on Surah Yusuf, the most beautiful story in the Quran.

episodes.label: The End of an Era — Yousuf's Legacy

title: Ertugrul Gazi (Dirilis: Ertugrul)
description: The story of Ertugrul Ghazi, father of Osman I who founded the Ottoman Empire. Set in the 13th century, it follows the brave Ertugrul and his Kayi tribe as they fight for justice, faith and their homeland against Mongols and Crusaders.

title: Kurulus: Osman
description: The story of Osman Ghazi, son of Ertugrul and founder of the Ottoman Empire. Following in his father's footsteps, Osman fights to establish a new state built on justice and faith, battling enemies from all sides to fulfil his destiny.
